title: Fort Lauderdale St. Patrick's Day Parade & Festival
venueName: Fort Lauderdale St. Patrick's Day Parade
address: Las Olas Blvd, Fort Lauderdale, FL 33301
shortWhy: Connect with the Fort Lauderdale community.
editorialWhy: Annual St. Patrick's Day parade and street festival through downtown Fort Lauderdale. Marching bands, floats, Irish food and drinks, live music. Located in Las Olas, Fort Lauderdale St. Patrick's Day Parade is a local favorite. Best of all, it's free.
description: Annual St. Patrick's Day parade and street festival through downtown Fort Lauderdale. Marching bands, floats, Irish food and drinks, live music.
seriesName: Fort Lauderdale St. Patrick's Day Parade & Festival

title: Fort Lauderdale Green Market
shortWhy: Local flavors and community vibes.
editorialWhy: Open-air farmers market along the New River with local produce, artisan food, plants, and handmade goods. A beloved Saturday morning tradition. Located in Riverwalk, Esplanade Park is a local favorite. Best of all, it's free.
description: Open-air farmers market along the New River with local produce, artisan food, plants, and handmade goods. A beloved Saturday morning tradition.

title: Tortuga Music Festival
address: Fort Lauderdale Beach Park, Fort Lauderdale, FL 33304
shortWhy: The kind of night Fort Lauderdale does best.
editorialWhy: Three-day country and rock festival on Fort Lauderdale Beach benefiting ocean conservation. Major headliners, food, and beachside stages. Located in Fort Lauderdale Beach, Tortuga Music Festival is a local favorite.
description: Three-day country and rock festival on Fort Lauderdale Beach benefiting ocean conservation. Major headliners, food, and beachside stages.

title: Ghost Tour at Stranahan House

title: Sistrunk Saturday Night Market
address: 1556 NW Sistrunk Blvd, Fort Lauderdale, FL 33311
shortWhy: Taste what makes Fort Lauderdale's food scene special.
editorialWhy: Vibrant outdoor market and food hall in the historic Sistrunk corridor. Local food vendors, craft beer, live DJs, and artisan makers. Located in Sistrunk, Sistrunk Marketplace & Brewery is a local favorite. Best of all, it's free.
description: Vibrant outdoor market and food hall in the historic Sistrunk corridor. Local food vendors, craft beer, live DJs, and artisan makers.

title: Birding Walk at Bonnet House
